## Overview

This fixture keeps ordinary objective bullets valid and visible.

## Learning Objectives

- Explain the local review loop.
- Practice the local review loop.
- Explain the local review loop.

## Section: Review The Loop

The repeated text is intentional so generated IDs must remain collision-safe.

```lecture-component
type: flashcard
id: legacy-review-card
anchor: legacy-review-card
prompt: "What does a local review loop do?"
answer: "It gives the learner a chance to revisit an activity."
```

## Key Takeaways

- Legacy objectives do not become referenceable IDs.
